cover:
A high-quality architectural system block diagram illustrating the "SOQL OPTIMIZATION: THE MISSING GUIDE".
Overall Theme: Technical architecture map, clean flow chart, analytical, educational, modern and well-structured layout.
Background: A very clean, subtle light gray background with faint grid lines.

Header:
- At the top-center, a massive dark bold rounded header block displaying "SOQL OPTIMIZATION: THE MISSING GUIDE".
- Below the title, a small subtitle: "soql query optimization tips".
- In the top-right corner, a small circular profile icon labeled "Bennie Joseph | Architect".

Architecture Layers (Arranged hierarchically with clear connections):
- A "Salesforce Org" container (colored in neon blue) containing modules: "Apex Triggers", "LWC Components", "SOQL Queries", "Platform Events", "Named Credentials".
- A "Integration Layer" container (colored in orange) containing modules: "API Gateway", "OAuth 2.0", "Named Credentials", "Connected App".
- A "External Systems" container (colored in neon green) containing modules: "AI / LLM APIs", "ERP Systems", "REST / GraphQL", "Webhooks".
- A central block at the heart of the system labeled "Salesforce Platform" with a rotating arrow icon. This central node has multiple dotted directional connector lines feeding into and out of all surrounding layers.
- An "INTEGRATION LAYER" box on the upper right with modules "REST API v64.0" and "Streaming API".
- A bottom panel labeled "KEY INSIGHTS" with sub-modules "Governor Limits Managed", "FLS + Sharing Enforced", "Bulkified Patterns".

Style Details: Technical blueprint style, clean rounded rectangle containers, precise dotted lines with arrowheads showing control and data flow, soft pastel color scheme (pale yellows, soft blues, light greens, and dark blues), micro vector icons inside each block, neat modern sans-serif fonts, absolutely crisp rendering, no blurred elements, zero spelling mistakes, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'SOQL Optimization: Selectivity First'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'SOQL Optimization: Selectivity First'. Subtitle 'Fast SOQL filters candidate rows before sorting, joining, or rendering'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Selective Filters with funnel icon', 'Indexed Fields with lightning index icon', 'Bounded Results with LIMIT 200 icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'NON-SELECTIVE QUERY' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'SELECTIVE QUERY' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: WHERE Status != 'Closed' AND Subject LIKE '%refund%', right column green border '// GOOD' code: WHERE AccountId = :accountId AND CreatedDate = LAST_N_DAYS:90 AND Type = :caseType LIMIT 100. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Filter on indexed fields', 'Avoid leading wildcards', 'Constrain date ranges'. Footer bar: 'If Salesforce scans too many rows, Apex cannot rescue the design.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'SOQL Anti-Patterns vs Production Patterns'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'SOQL Anti-Patterns vs Production Patterns'. Subtitle 'Bulkified code can still be slow when filters are non-selective'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Avoid SOQL in Loops with loop warning icon', 'Avoid SELECT Everything with payload icon', 'Avoid Fuzzy LIKE with magnifying glass icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'ANTI-PATTERNS' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'PRODUCTION PATTERNS' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: SELECT Id, Description__c FROM Claim__c WHERE Status__c != 'Archived' AND Description__c LIKE '%text%', right column green border '// GOOD' code: SELECT Id, Claim_Number__c FROM Claim__c WHERE Policy__c = :policyId AND Loss_Date__c = LAST_N_DAYS:730 LIMIT 100. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Use Query Plan', 'Design indexed lookup fields', 'Split list and detail queries'. Footer bar: 'Optimization is a data access design problem, not a syntax cleanup task.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
